# kCGImagePropertyDNGDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses the Digital Negative (DNG) archival format.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyDNGDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/dng-image-properties].
title: kCGImagePropertyDNGDictionary
